CREATE TABLE remote_test (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE remote_test2 (id UInt32, age UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT remote('127.0.0.1:9000', 'remote_test2') AS remote_data WHERE id > 1;
SELECT remote('127.0.0.1:9000', 'remote_test', 'default', 'user') AS remote_data WHERE name LIKE 'A%';
SELECT remote('127.0.0.1:9000', 'remote_test', sharding_key) AS remote_data FROM remote_test WHERE id = 2;
SELECT remoteSecure('127.0.0.1:9000', 'remote_test', 'default', 'user', 'password') AS remote_data WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM remote_test2 WHERE age > 28);
SELECT * FROM remote('127.0.0.1:9000', 'remote_test') UNION ALL SELECT * FROM remote('127.0.0.1:9000', 'remote_test2');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM remote('127.0.0.1:9000', 'remote_test') WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM remote('127.0.0.1:9000', 'remote_test2') WHERE age < 30);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS remote_test3 (id UInt32, salary Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE remote_test4 (id UInt32, projectName String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO remote_test4 VALUES (1, 'Project Alpha'), (2, 'Project Beta');
SELECT remote('127.0.0.1:9000', 'remote_test') AS u1, remote('127.0.0.1:9000', 'remote_test4') AS u2 WHERE u1.id = u2.id;
